name: Knight's Gallop
description: Algo-rhythmic dual trigger generator. Five rhythmic tables (Euclidean, Divider, Anti-Euclidean, Split) multiplied by five Out 2 modes build practically infinite polyrhythms from a single clock.

controls.name: Length Potentiometer
controls.description: Sets sequence length from 1 to 8 steps. Mode+Table together extend range to 9-16 steps.
controls.detail: 1-8 default · 9-16 via Mode+Table · Length+ LED shows extended range · CV input additive

controls.name: Pulses Potentiometer
controls.description: Number of hits in the sequence. Full CCW mutes outputs. Full CW distributes maximum hits. CV-addressable.
controls.detail: 0 hits = mute · max CW = all steps active · Record mode: CW rolls triggers every step

controls.name: Mode Button
controls.description: Cycles through five modes controlling how Out 2 derives from Out 1: Main, Compute, Random, Dual, Record.
controls.detail: MN · CP · RD · DL · RC · sub-modes via Mode+/- buttons

controls.name: Table Button
controls.description: Selects one of five rhythmic tables: Divider, Classic Euclidean, Revised Euclidean, Anti-Euclidean, Split Sequences.
controls.detail: Boots on Revised Euclidean · Mode+Table combo toggles 9-16 step range

controls.name: +/- Shift Buttons
controls.description: Rotates the sequence one step forward or backward. Holds function as sub-mode navigation while Mode is held.
controls.detail: + = forward 1 step · - = backward 1 step · also edit sub-modes · records patterns in RC mode

inputs.name: Length CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to the Length pot value.

inputs.name: Pulses CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to the Pulses pot value. In Record mode, controls roll density.

outputs.name: Out 1
outputs.description: Primary trigger output of the selected table/length/pulses/shift combination.

outputs.name: Out 2
outputs.description: Secondary trigger output algorithmically derived from Out 1 per the selected mode and sub-mode.

behaviors.name: Main Mode (MN)
behaviors.description: Utility sub-modes on Out 2: Reset (pulse every first step), No Shift (same as Out 1 but immune to Shift), Invert (inverse of Out 1), Backward (Out 1 pattern reversed).

behaviors.name: Compute Mode (CP)
behaviors.description: Out 2 plays a related sequence derived mathematically from Out 1: L & P/2, L/2 & P/2, 2L/3 & 2P/3, L-P & P/2. Final sub-mode auto-resets Out 2 from Out 1.

behaviors.name: Random Mode (RD)
behaviors.description: Adds randomness to Out 2. Sub-modes: No Random, Soft Fill (low-probability read of L/2+P/2 pattern), Hard Fill (higher probability), Full Random (per-step probability scaled by Pulses).

behaviors.name: Dual Mode (DL)
behaviors.description: Out 1 and Out 2 carry independent settings. Pots must cross their stored value before taking effect (Length+ LED flashes). CV inputs disabled in this mode.

behaviors.name: Record Mode (RC)
behaviors.description: Record sequences via +/- buttons (- to Out 1, + to Out 2), quantized to incoming clock. Sub-modes: Record and Play. Pulses CW causes outputs to roll (trigger every step).

behaviors.name: Extended Length Range
behaviors.description: Toggles Length range between 1-8 (default) and 9-16 steps. Length+ LED lit confirms 9-16 range.

patchIdeas.name: Classic Euclidean drum pair
patchIdeas.patch: Revised Euclidean table · L=16 P=5 on Out 1 → kick · Main mode / Invert sub-mode on Out 2 → hats fill the gaps
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Table: Revised Euclidean · Mode: MN/Invert · L=16 P=5
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Hat (Trig) // inverse of Out 1

patchIdeas.name: Compute polyrhythm pair
patchIdeas.patch: CP mode / L & P/2 sub-mode · Out 1 kick busy, Out 2 snare with half the hits over same length · shared clock keeps them phase-locked
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Mode: CP · sub: L & P/2 · L=12 P=6
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig) // 6 hits / 12 steps
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig) // 3 hits / 12 steps

patchIdeas.name: Anti-Euclidean tom fills
patchIdeas.patch: Anti-Euclidean table packs hits at sequence extremes · Pulses CV from envelope peaks injects unpredictable fill density · Reset CV from bar-length divider keeps phrases aligned
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Table: Anti-Euclidean
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Bar Clock (Out) t> Knight's Gallop (Reset)
- Envelope (Out) >> Knight's Gallop (Pulses CV) // density swells
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Tom (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Rim (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Live shift groove morph
patchIdeas.patch: Steady 16-step Revised Euclidean pattern · +/- Shift buttons rotate the pattern live · Out 2 in MN/No Shift holds a reference downbeat · creates call-and-response between steady and shifting drum
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Mode: MN/No Shift · L=16 P=6
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Shifting Drum (Trig) // rotates with +/-
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Steady Drum (Trig) // anchor

patchIdeas.name: Dual independent patterns
patchIdeas.patch: DL mode lets Out 1 and Out 2 run completely different tables/lengths/pulses · sub-mode 1 sets Out 2 (busy Euclidean) · sub-mode 2 sets Out 1 (sparse divider) · one module, two sequencers
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Mode: DL · Out1=Divider L=8 P=2 · Out2=Eucl L=13 P=7
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Bass Drum (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Hat (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Generative fills with Random
patchIdeas.patch: RD mode / Hard Fill sub-mode · Out 1 plays strict Euclidean kick · Out 2 probabilistically sprinkles L/2+P/2 variant for organic fill accents · Pulses CV automates fill intensity
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Mode: RD/Hard Fill · L=16 P=4
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Knight's Gallop (Pulses CV)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig) // random fills

patchIdeas.name: CV-recorded loop with roll
patchIdeas.patch: RC mode · tap rhythm into +/- buttons to capture an 8-step groove · during playback, Pulses CV from joystick or touch plate causes snare rolls (Pulses max = trigger every step)
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Mode: RC/Play
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Touch Plate (CV) >> Knight's Gallop (Pulses CV) // rolls at max
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Long bars via extended length
patchIdeas.patch: Mode+Table toggles 9-16 step range · L=16 P=5 Revised Euclidean makes a 16-step phrase · Length CV sweeps to 9 for mid-phrase variation · Reset locked to bar
patchIdeas.diagram:
KNIGHT'S GALLOP:
* Extended range · L=9-16 P=5
- Clock (Out) c> Knight's Gallop (Clock)
- Bar Clock (Out) t> Knight's Gallop (Reset)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Knight's Gallop (Length CV) // L sweeps 9-16
- Knight's Gallop (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Knight's Gallop (Out 2) t> Hat (Trig)
